summary: Capture the seeded Cadence board and confirm the three columns render with their cards and counts.

content.objective: Verify that the board loads with the three lifecycle columns and their seeded cards visible.
actions: Wait for the board to finish loading
validations: The Backlog column is visible with a count of 3
The In Progress column is visible with a count of 2
The Done column is visible with a count of 3
The card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' appears in the Backlog column

summary: Add a new card through the modal and confirm it lands in Backlog with the count incremented.

content.objective: Verify that adding a card via the Add card modal creates a new card in the Backlog column.
actions: Click the Add card button in the top toolbar
Type 'Plan launch checklist' into the title input
validations: A card titled 'Plan launch checklist' appears in the Backlog column
The Backlog column count now reads 4

summary: Move the new card one column to the right into In Progress using its Move button.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the right-pointing Move button on the new card moves it from Backlog into In Progress.
actions: Click the right-pointing Move button on the 'Plan launch checklist' card
validations: The card titled 'Plan launch checklist' now appears in the In Progress column
The card titled 'Plan launch checklist' is no longer in the Backlog column

summary: Move the same card right again into Done.

content.objective: Verify that clicking the right-pointing Move button again moves the card from In Progress into Done.
actions: Click the right-pointing Move button on the 'Plan launch checklist' card
validations: The card titled 'Plan launch checklist' now appears in the Done column
The card titled 'Plan launch checklist' is no longer in the In Progress column

summary: Edit an existing card's title through the editor modal and confirm the card updates in place.

content.objective: Verify that editing a card updates its visible title after saving. The Card Editor view is captured with the edit modal open and pre-filled.
actions: Click the edit button on the 'Audit color contrast' card in the Backlog column
Type 'Audit color contrast across themes' into the title input
validations: A card titled 'Audit color contrast across themes' appears in the Backlog column
No card titled exactly 'Audit color contrast' remains on the board

summary: Filter the board by a tag and confirm only matching cards remain, then clear the filter.

content.objective: Verify that selecting a tag in the filter narrows the board to cards carrying that tag, and that clearing the filter restores all cards.
actions: Select 'Writing' from the tag filter dropdown in the top toolbar
validations: After clearing, the card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' is visible again
After clearing, the Backlog column count reads 3

summary: Reload the page and confirm the previously added and moved card is still in Done, proving the board persists in the browser.

content.objective: Verify that after refreshing the browser the 'Plan launch checklist' card persists in the Done column.
actions: Wait for the board to finish loading
validations: The card titled 'Plan launch checklist' appears in the Done column after the reload

summary: Delete a card and confirm it disappears and the column count decrements.

content.objective: Verify that deleting a card removes it from its column and decreases that column's count.
actions: Click the delete button on the 'Draft weekly changelog' card in the Backlog column
validations: No card titled 'Draft weekly changelog' remains on the board
The Backlog column count decreases to reflect the removal
